validation_rules.notes: It's just me. No reimbursements to process.
Photo of receipt in phone, log at end of month
Comes out of the tools-fund savings, not job money
Check every charge against Carolina Savings statement
Ridgeline day-job stuff never goes here

context: Loose notes on how I handle receipts and spending for the woodworking side gig. Not a real company policy, just how I keep it straight.
